summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Physical AI, Humanoids and Drones Fund (WDRN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is passively managed, providing exposure to global equities involved with physical artificial intelligence. Holdings are initially equally weighted then adjusted based on thematic and relevancy scores. WDRN was launched on May 14, 2026 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.text: The war in Ukraine stands as confirmation that drone technology is a key element in the future of warfare. Obviously, peace is preferable, but a moving target.

data.text: Generative AI largely kick-started the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution. More recently, agentic AI is gaining momentum.

data.title: AI, Drones, Robotics Come Together in New ETF
data.text: The artificial intelligence (AI) evolution moves at breakneck speed. While generative AI is still a significant part of the underlying investment thesis, physical AI is rapidly accruing momentum.

holdings.infoBox: WDRN is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Leader Harmonious Drive Systems stock at 4.75%, Ubtech Robotics Corp at 3.79%, Harmonic Drive Systems at 3.77%, AeroVironment at 2.99%, and Red Cat Holdings at 2.83%.
